lastReleaseMessage: dashboard: writer emits standardized items-left and backlog item lists

items: Real-use testing and iterate cycles still pending (demo-seed harness now exists to unblock it: scripts/seed-demo.ps1)
Live payment integration on top of the v0.6.0 per-seat entitlement plumbing (Stripe checkout + webhooks; entitlement is computed but nothing is gated yet)

barRaise.topFinding: Carry-forward pass (day 2): zero commits, no BLOCK, work queue at 0, and all five hard rules still pass, so no 27-lens re-fan-out. The one real delta is positive: version-pill-drift-01 is resolved in the working tree. docs/DESIGN.md now carries the org_billing table and users.billing_exempt column in section 15 (plus the matching index lines) and the three /api/billing routes in section 16, so the canonical reference matches v0.6.0. The fix is uncommitted and the two prior dashboard-writer commits (a904f11, 9d59f44) are still local (HEAD 2 ahead of origin/main); a single release.ps1 run flushes both. Three open actions carry forward (audit-loop-integrity, observability route-count regex, solo-tool-ux README), all aged to runsOpen 2; the three strategic/cost items remain deferred behind Nick posture decisions.

actions.title: Make the canonical audit release-aware: trigger a post-commit audit pass at the end of release.ps1 (dedupe by finding-id) so an evening ship is re-checked the same day.
Fix the route-count regex in scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 to match handlers on *Route sub-instances so the dashboard stops reporting api routes: 0.
Add a Real-use testing subsection to README.md naming scripts/seed-demo.ps1, the -Remote flag, and the sign-in-then-switch-to-demo step.

deferred.title: Gate any further billing-layer build (tier pricing, dunning, customer portal) behind committing to the Stripe milestone so entitlement work stops accreting cost ahead of revenue.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: commit to Stripe milestone

deferred.title: Make real-use testing via seed-demo.ps1 the explicit next gate and hold further billing-layer work until the core schedule loop is validated against the DESIGN section 1.2 success criteria.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: drive to first real user vs re-park

deferred.title: Record an explicit DESIGN section 23 decision on whether YaS is being driven to first real user or re-parked after the entitlement layer.
deferred.reason: blocked on Nick decision: posture call
